name: Fluted Quiche Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the sausage with onion and drain excess fat.
2. In a large bowl, combine remaining ingredients (including sausage) until well mixed.
3. Grease a muffin tin and line with crepe batter.
4. Fill each cavity about 3/4 full with the sausage mixture.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
6. Loosely cover with foil and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes, or until set.
7. Crepe batter: In a blender, combine all ingredients and blend until smooth. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
8. Cook crepes by cooking the bottom side until browned, then carefully turning with a spatula to cook the top side briefly.
9. Remove cooked crepes from the pan and stack on a plate or tray.
10. Freeze in muffin tins, then store in plastic bags. This recipe makes 32-36 quiche cups.
